#Sakhiraj Grid Bot

Official website:
https://gridbot.adquash.com/

Sakhiraj Grid Bot is a cloud-based KuCoin Spot Trading platform offering a predefined Grid + DCA strategy with smart capital management, Global Exit logic and annual subscription.

https://gridbot.adquash.com/

https://gridbot.adquash.com/privacy-policy.html

https://gridbot.adquash.com/disclaimer.html

https://gridbot.adquash.com/risk-disclosure.html

Platform

Supported Exchange

KuCoin Spot Trading

Business Model

Annual Subscription

No software download.

Browser-based access.

Cloud-hosted platform.

Important Notes

Customer funds always remain in the customer's own KuCoin account.

Trading requires KuCoin API configuration.

No financial or investment advice is provided.

Cryptocurrency trading involves risk.

Contact

https://gridbot.adquash.com/contact.html
